name: io.github.djerok/glm-mcp
description: GLM (Zhipu/Z.ai) as a ~10x cheaper file-editing subagent for AI coding agents.
title: GLM MCP

environmentVariables.name: GLM_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Z.ai / Zhipu GLM Coding Plan API key. Required for GLM calls; the server boots and answers MCP introspection without it.
